title: 3D Mace
description: A resource pack that changes the mace to 3D without losing vanilla.
body:
![3D Mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/096cc7fd65bc4a03b9470a4c04bdf488f594bfcf.png)

## What does this resource pack do?

- **This resource pack changes the mace model added in snapshot 24w11a to 3D, without losing vanilla.**

## Does the resource pack require OptiFine or CIT Resewn?

- **No. The resource pack even works on regular vanilla.**

## It says “The resource pack is intended for an older/new version!”, what should I do?

- **Just ignore it. The fact is that the resource pack was made for 24w11a, that is, exactly when the mace was added.**

## Will there be resource pack updates for new versions?

- **Of course yes.**

## Can I take this resource pack and put it on another platform?

- **No. Please do not claim my work as your own, even if you have changed anything in it.**

## Will older versions of the resource pack be supported?

- **No. We recommend using the latest versions of the resource pack so that there are no problems.**
